prompt: 我把 SVG 概念图插进 source-transcript.md 后，handout.html 第一页只显示一个很小的图，后面的第1讲还挤在同一页。请给出修复方案。
assertions: Identifies generic transcript image CSS as the likely scaling cause.
Adds a dedicated concept-map sheet and image overrides.
Forces the first lecture/chapter heading after the cover onto a fresh sheet.
Requires rendering PDF/screenshot to verify full-page coverage.
